entries.title: AUTOCOMMENT REDIRECT INVESTIGATION
verified_against: PR8A evidence pack + proof-integrity fix shipped (manifest 0.5.19)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24H; moved under comment-automation/evidence/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Historical PR8 auto-comment redirect investigation; the PR8A Evidence Pack + proof-integrity fix (buildCommentProof reorder) shipped (manifest 0.5.19). Companion to the archived root-cause-report; the remaining PR8B step is operator-owned. Historical evidence, non-authoritative and not effective.

entries.title: Comment Automation — Technical Contract
verified_against: PR24C: targeted tests executed and PASS — `go test ./internal/store/ -run 'CommentForensics|Reverify'` (9 tests incl. TestClassifyCommentForensics_Buckets)
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24C; promoted to comment-automation/technical.md in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Forensics classifier + soft-touch semantics + async reverify (Part D) shipped; backed by comment_forensics_test.go and comment_reverify_lease_test.go. Owns only current test-pinned comment execution + reverification behavior; historical redirect evidence lives in evidence/. Complements active lead-lifecycle-work-queue (waiting_verification state).

entries.title: Direct-Link Comment Smoke — Runbook
verified_against: current operator smoke runbook for live comment_single_post / GetLeadByPostRef behavior
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24H; moved under comment-automation/runbooks/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Current operator smoke runbook for the NL direct-link comment behavior (comment_single_post queues only when the lead pre-exists via GetLeadByPostRef). Maps to verified current code and validates active direct-post-intake-workflow. Active/reviewed runbook.

entries.title: ROOT CAUSE REPORT
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24E; moved under comment-automation/evidence/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21). Completed root-cause investigation report (2026-06-04) for the autocomment redirect failure; conclusion fed the PR8 redirect work. Historical evidence, non-authoritative and not effective. Companion to the archived autocomment-redirect-investigation.
